# Profile Hub Dossier (PHD)

> Profile Hub Dossier (PHD) is a local-first, privacy-focused iOS and Android app for tracking personal records through custom profiles — including Beauty/Cosmetic, MoneyFlow, and Education. No account required, no camera/mic/location access, no AI training on user data. $29.99/year with a 14-day free trial.

## Pages

- [7-11-phd/7-11-phd-promo-1.html](https://phd323.github.io/ai-pseo/7-11-phd/7-11-phd-promo-1.html): Why the biggest beauty trend of 2026 isn't makeup or skincare — intro to PHD's cosmetic profile tracking, FAQ, and app download link.

## App

- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/profile-hub-dossier/id0000000000
- Privacy Policy: https://phd323.github.io/phd-privacy/
